sub_strands.sub_strand: Critical Listening, Symposiums, and Rhetorical Devices
outcomes: Evaluate extended panel presentations and public speeches to decode rhetorical devices (ethos, pathos, logos) and subtle propoganda techniques
Lead complex symposium sessions and academic presentations with stylistic fluency, adapting tone and register to audience profiles

sub_strands.sub_strand: Comparative Literature and Contextual Analysis
outcomes: Compare themes, archetypal character sets, and localized cultural conflicts across distinct multi-cultural poetry anthologies and play scripts
Synthesize dense information from complex legal, technical, and informational texts to validate or challenge specific hypotheses

sub_strands.sub_strand: Advanced Functional Genres and Syntactic Control
outcomes: Compose comprehensive investigative reports, critical research essays, and legalistic business proposals incorporating parenthetical citations
Demonstrate absolute control over complex syntax patterns including subjunctive mood configurations, relative pronoun tracking, and compound-complex configurations

sub_strands.sub_strand: Uchambuzi wa Hotuba na Majadiliano ya Kongamano
outcomes: Kusikiliza, kuchambua, na kukosoa kwa kina taarifa na hotuba rasmi za kitaifa na kimataifa
Kuendesha makongamano na kuwasilisha mada changamano kwa Kiswahili fasaha, ufasaha wa matamshi na utumiaji wa mbinu za ushawishi

sub_strands.sub_strand: Uhakiki wa Fasihi na Maandishi Teule
outcomes: Kuhakiki tamthilia na riwaya za Kiswahili kwa kuchambua dhamira, migogoro, falsafa ya mwandishi, na matumizi ya lugha ya kisanii
Kusoma na kufafanua fasihi simulizi changamano kama vile miviga, migaji, na visasili vya kijamii

sub_strands.sub_strand: Uandishi wa Kitaalamu na Sarufi ya Kina
outcomes: Kuandika ripoti za utafiti, risala, na insha changamano za kitaaluma zilizofanyiwa marejeleo ya kutosha
Kutumia kwa ufasaha miundo yote ya sentensi (rahisi, ambatano, changamano), usemi wa taarifa na usemi halisi, na unyambulishaji wa vitendo

sub_strands.sub_strand: Quadratic Expressions, Equations, and Cartesian Graphs
outcomes: Expand quadratic expressions and factorize expressions of the form $ax^2 + bx + c = 0$ using various algebraic methods
Determine the gradient, mid-point, and length of a straight line segment plotted on a 2D Cartesian coordinate grid system
Formulate and solve quadratic equations from practical problems and draw their corresponding parabolic curves

sub_strands.sub_strand: Trigonometric Ratios and Surface Area/Volume of Spheres
outcomes: Define, calculate, and apply the primary trigonometric ratios (sine, cosine, tangent) to find lengths and angles in right-angled triangles
Calculate the surface area and volume of regular spheres, hemispheres, and compound geometric solids encountered in design setups

sub_strands.sub_strand: Transformation Geometry
outcomes: Perform reflection, rotation, and translation transformations on geometric figures within a coordinate plane mapping framework

sub_strands.sub_strand: Grouped Data Metrics and Advanced Financial Math
outcomes: Construct frequency distribution tables for grouped data and compute the estimated mean and modal class metrics
Calculate compound interest over extended durations, compound depreciation, and interpret simple stock market indices and tax matrices (PAYE models)

sub_strands.sub_strand: The Periodic Table, Chemical Bonds, and Simple Chemical Reactions
outcomes: Explain the arrangement of elements in the periodic table based on atomic structure and identify trends across periods and down groups
Investigate how ionic and covalent chemical bonds form and construct balanced chemical equations for reactions between simple metals and dilute acids

sub_strands.sub_strand: Electromagnetic Waves, Sound Propagation, and Light Refraction
outcomes: Examine the properties and uses of components within the electromagnetic spectrum and investigate the laws of light refraction using glass blocks
Determine speed, frequency, and wavelength properties of transverse and longitudinal waves moving through media fields

sub_strands.sub_strand: Introduction to Genetics, Inheritance, and Environmental Sustainability
outcomes: Describe structural configurations of chromosomes and DNA and explain how basic dominant and recessive traits pass across generations
Evaluate the role of ecological interactions (food webs, nutrient cycles) and formulate systemic frameworks to mitigate local environmental crises

sub_strands.sub_strand: Global Climatic Systems and Major Economic Blocs
outcomes: Map and analyze the physical characteristics of major global climatic zones and their explicitly correlated economic activities
Examine the historical formation, objectives, and administrative structures of major global and African economic organizations (e.g., EAC, COMESA, AU, UN)

sub_strands.sub_strand: The Struggle for Independence, Constitutional Rights, and Global Relations
outcomes: Critique political and armed paths to Kenyan independence, highlighting key nationalist organizational frameworks
Analyze the structures and operational profiles of the devolved governance system in Kenya (County Assemblies vs. County Executives)
Evaluate the roles and duties of an individual within global governance, human rights declarations, and international conflict resolution processes

sub_strands.sub_strand: Sectional Views, Development of Surfaces, and CAD Overview
outcomes: Construct standard sectional orthographic views of complex mechanical assemblies to expose internal structural traits
Draw accurate development patterns of prisms, cylinders, and pyramids for sheet-metal fabrication operations
Navigate basic computer-aided design (CAD) software interfaces to compile linear engineering geometries and wireframe models

sub_strands.sub_strand: Fluid Systems, Sensors, and Basic Automation Frameworks
outcomes: Demonstrate the engineering applications of simple hydraulic and pneumatic principles in everyday mechanical machinery
Design and construct basic electronic automated warning or tracking systems incorporating sensors, microcontrollers, and logic relays

sub_strands.sub_strand: Farm Records, Agribusiness Models, and Smart Farming Technology
outcomes: Prepare, analyze, and interpret complex farm accounting tools, income statements, inventory records, and production budgets
Evaluate agribusiness marketing models and outline applications of modern automated sensors or drip automation systems in crop handling

strands.strand: Nutrition, Food Technology, and Hospitality Foundation

sub_strands.sub_strand: Catering Principles, Meal Planning, and Food Chemistry Basics
outcomes: Plan, cost, cook, and display large-scale healthy multi-course meals adhering to commercial food safety and hospitality guidelines
Examine factors that induce chemical changes or spoilage in food nutrients during standard thermal processing, cooking, and fermentation cycles

sub_strands.sub_strand: Exhibition Layouts, Portfolio Management, and Commercial Art
outcomes: Plan, organize, and curate a formal school art exhibition displaying diverse artistic styles and calculating commercial values
Create complex corporate marketing advertisements, digital vectors, and brand identity guides for localized business entities

sub_strands.sub_strand: Four-Part Harmony, Play Direction, and Musical Performance Masterclasses
outcomes: Identify and sing or play melodies tracking basic four-part harmonic voicings (Soprano, Alto, Tenor, Bass) on a grand staff grid
Direct, block, stage, and evaluate full-length theatrical narratives incorporating audio engineering elements and aesthetic set designs
